popularStory.headline: Beatrice of Provence (c. 1229-23 September 1267)
popularStory.description: Beatrice of Provence (c. 1229-23 September 1267), was ruling Countess of Provence and Forcalquier from 1245 until her death, as well as Countess of Anjou and Maine, Queen of Sicily and Naples by marri …

sourceList.title: Beatrice de Provence, “Índice Find A Grave”
Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - BEATRICE de Provence ([1232/34]-Naples 23 Sep 1267, bur Naples, Cathedral of San Gennaro, transferred 1277 to Aix-en-Provence, Church of St Jean de Jerusalem).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Béatrice de Provence Reine de Sicile於1231年出生在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o艾--普洛福斯時，她的父親Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IV36歲，母親Béatrice de Savoie33歲。她和Charles I d'Anjou Roi de Naples et de Sicile至少有4個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1267年10月7日在義大利卡拉布里亞卡坦扎羅諾拉享年36歲，埋葬在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o艾--普洛福斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Béatrice de Provence Reine de Sicile于1231年出生在法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o艾--普洛福斯时，她的父亲Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IV36岁，母亲Béatrice de Savoie33岁。她和Charles I d'Anjou Roi de Naples et de Sicile至少有4个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1267年10月7日在意大利卡拉布里亞卡坦扎羅諾拉享年36岁，埋葬在法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o艾--普洛福斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Provence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Province   1, a cognate of 3 below. This surname is very rare in Britain.
Probably also an altered form of   Provance   1 and hence a variant of   Purviance  , a surname of (ultimately) Scottish origin. Compare   Provance   1.
In some cases possibly also French: habitational name from Provence, a region in southern France (see   Provencal  ). Compare   Province   3 and also 1 above.

variants.name: Province
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Provence, a region in southern France (see   Provencal  ). Compare   Provence   1 and   Provins   1.
Altered form of   Provance   1 and hence a variant of   Purviance  , a surname of (ultimately) Scottish origin. Compare   Provins   2.

nameMeanings.name: Béatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

en.lifeSummary: When Béatrice de Provence Reine de Sicile was born in 1231, in Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, her father, Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IV, was 36 and her mother, Béatrice de Savoie, was 33. She had at least 4 sons and 4 daughters with Charles I d'Anjou Roi de Naples et de Sicile. She died on 7 October 1267, in Nocera, Catanzaro, Calabria, Italy, at the age of 36, and was buried in Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Béatrice de Provence Reine de Sicile est née en 1231, à Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, son père, Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IV, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Béatrice de Savoie, avait 33 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles avec Charles I d'Anjou Roi de Naples et de Sicile. Elle est décédée le 7 octobre 1267, à Nocera, Catanzaro, Calabria, Italie, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterrée à Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Béatrice de Provence Reine de Sicile 1231 in Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IV 36 und ihre Mutter Béatrice de Savoie 33. Sie hatte mit Charles I d'Anjou Roi de Naples et de Sicile mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 7. Oktober 1267 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Nocera, Catanzaro, Calabria, Italien und wurde in Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Béatrice de Provence Reine de Sicile è nata il nel 1231 nel Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, sua padre, Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IV, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Béatrice de Savoie, aveva 33 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie con Charles I d'Anjou Roi de Naples et de Sicile. Morì il 7 ottobre 1267, nel Nocera, Catanzaro, Calabria, Italia, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolta a Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Béatrice de Provence Reine de Sicileが1231年にフランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルボウチェス-ドウ-ルhoンエイクス-エン-プローベンスで生まれた時，父Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IVは36歳，母Béatrice de Savoieは33歳であった。彼女はCharles I d'Anjou Roi de Naples et de Sicileとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1267年10月7日にイタリアカラブリアカタンザロノセラで36歳で死去し，フランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルボウチェス-ドウ-ルhoンエイクス-エン-プローベンスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Béatrice de Provence Reine de Sicile(이)가 1231년 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 부체스-드-ho니 아이스--프로븐스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IV(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Béatrice de Savoie(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 Charles I d'Anjou Roi de Naples et de Sicile(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1267년 10월 7일 이탈리아 캘라브리아 카탠자로 노서아에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 부체스-드-ho니 아이스--프로븐스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Béatrice de Provence Reine de Sicile nasceu em 1231, em Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França, seu pai, Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IV, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Béatrice de Savoie, tinha 33 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas com Charles I d'Anjou Roi de Naples et de Sicile. Ela faleceu em 7 de outubro de 1267, em Nocera, Catanzaro, Calabria, Itália, com 36 anos, e foi sepultada em Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Béatrice de Provence Reine de Sicile родилась в 1231 г. в местности эикс-ен-провенс, боучес-ду-рoн, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция, её отцу по имени Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IV было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Béatrice de Savoie, 33. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери от Charles I d'Anjou Roi de Naples et de Sicile. Она умерла 7 октября 1267 г. в местности носира, катанзаро, калабря, Италия в возрасте 36 лет и была похоронена в местности эикс-ен-провенс, боучес-ду-рoн, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Béatrice de Provence Reine de Sicile nació en 1231, en Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, su papá, Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IV, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Béatrice de Savoie, tenía 33 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas con Charles I d'Anjou Roi de Naples et de Sicile. Murió el 7 de octubre de 1267, en Nocera, Catanzaro, Calabria, Italia, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultada en Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia.
